feat.name: Sidestep
feat.text: You deftly step aside and gently redirect an attack. You redirect the triggering attack to a creature of your choice that is adjacent to you and within the attack's reach or maximum range. The attacker rerolls the Strike’s attack roll against the new target.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

feat.trigger: The attack roll for a Strike targeting you fails or critically fails
